steps.expected: FADE_AREA defines Bushwick boundaries (~40.680-40.715 N, 73.890-73.945 W)
steps.observed: FADE_AREA: north=40.715, south=40.680, east=-73.890, west=-73.945 — matches specification

steps.expected: Multiple concentric rings with increasing opacity for smooth fade
GeoJSON FeatureCollection with polygon ring bands around Bushwick area
steps.observed: Function creates 7 concentric ring polygon features (outer hole rings) plus outermost ring extending 1.0° beyond. Each feature has a 'ring' property for layer filtering.

steps.action: Verify createBoundaryFadeLayers() creates MapLibre fill layers
steps.expected: Fill layers with dark color and graduated opacity for each ring
steps.observed: Creates fill layers: boundary-fade-ring-1 through boundary-fade-ring-7, fill-color=#0a0a1a (dark purple-black), fill-opacity matching FADE_RINGS opacity values

steps.action: Verify map-view.tsx integrates boundary fade source and layers
steps.expected: Source id='boundary-fade' with Layer components rendered inside Map
steps.observed: <Source id='boundary-fade' type='geojson' data={fadeGeoJSON}> with {fadeLayers.map(layer => <Layer .../>)} — correctly integrated

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3100 and take screenshot
steps.expected: Map loads with visual boundary effect
steps.observed: Map loaded successfully. Screenshot taken. WebGL canvas present (rendering limited in headless Chrome as documented).

evidence.codeVerification: lib/map/map-bounds.ts: FADE_AREA={north:40.715,south:40.680,east:-73.890,west:-73.945}, 7 FADE_RINGS (opacity 0.0→0.95), createBoundaryFadeGeoJSON() generates concentric ring polygons, createBoundaryFadeLayers() generates fill layers with #0a0a1a color
evidence.domVerification: map-view.tsx: <Source id='boundary-fade'> with <Layer> components for each fade ring rendered inside <Map>

steps.expected: maxBounds defined with sw and ne corners covering Bushwick area (~40.675-40.720 lat, -73.885 to -73.950 lng)

steps.action: Verify maxBounds is passed to Map component in map-view.tsx
steps.observed: maxBounds={maxBounds} prop present on <Map> component, computed from MAP_BOUNDS.maxBounds.sw and .ne

steps.action: Evaluate React props via JS to confirm maxBounds is active at runtime
steps.expected: maxBounds property found in React component props
steps.observed: React fiber props show maxBoundsFromProps: [[-73.95, 40.675], [-73.885, 40.72]] — matches MAP_BOUNDS configuration

steps.expected: Manhattan coordinates fall outside the maxBounds rectangle
steps.observed: Manhattan lat 40.758 > ne lat 40.720, Manhattan lng -73.985 < sw lng -73.950 — both dimensions outside bounds, confirming user cannot navigate there

steps.action: Verify minZoom and maxZoom are also constrained
steps.expected: Zoom bounds defined to prevent zooming too far in/out
steps.observed: minZoom=12, maxZoom=18 defined in MAP_BOUNDS and applied to <Map> component

evidence.jsEval: React fiber props confirm maxBounds=[[-73.95,40.675],[-73.885,40.72]] active on Map component at runtime
evidence.codeVerification: lib/map/map-style.ts: MAP_BOUNDS.maxBounds={sw:[-73.950,40.675],ne:[-73.885,40.720]}, minZoom=12, maxZoom=18. map-view.tsx: maxBounds={maxBounds} prop on <Map>

steps.action: Read data/places.ts and count total places
steps.observed: 21 places found in the places array

steps.expected: clubs, bars, coffee, restaurants, stores, other
steps.observed: All 6 categories present: clubs (4), bars (6), coffee (2), restaurants (3), stores (2), other (4) = 21 total

steps.action: Verify all coordinates within Bushwick area (~40.680-40.715°N, 73.890-73.945°W)
steps.expected: All lat values between ~40.680-40.715, all lng values between ~-73.890 and -73.945
steps.observed: All 21 places have valid coordinates within Bushwick area. Lat range: 40.6932 (Wonderville) to 40.7115 (Refuge). Lng range: -73.9384 (Ornithology) to -73.9059 (TV Eye). All within bounds.

steps.action: Verify places include real Bushwick destinations
steps.observed: All places are real Bushwick destinations: House of Yes, SEY Coffee, Ops Pizza, Maria Hernandez Park, Mood Ring, Jupiter Disco, Wonderville, etc.

steps.action: Verify CATEGORIES constant defines all 6 categories with colors
steps.expected: Category map with display names and marker colors
steps.observed: CATEGORIES record defines: bars (#F0903A), coffee (#58F2A5), restaurants (#54A2D4), clubs (#765898), stores (#F6E201), other (#E81900)

steps.action: Verify Place interface has required fields
steps.expected: id, name, description, category, address, lat, lng, optional hours/website
steps.observed: Place interface: id(string), name(string), description(string), category(PlaceCategory), address(string), lat(number), lng(number), hours?(string), website?(string). All places conform.

evidence.fileCheck: data/places.ts: 21 places across 6 categories (clubs:4, bars:6, coffee:2, restaurants:3, stores:2, other:4). All coordinates within Bushwick bounds. All real destinations.

frictions.description: MapLibre map instance is not directly accessible via JS evaluation in headless Chrome — react-map-gl encapsulates the instance internally. map.getMaxBounds() cannot be called directly; React fiber props were used as alternative evidence.
frictions.resolution: Used React fiber traversal to extract maxBounds from component props, plus source code verification of MAP_BOUNDS configuration

frictions.description: WebGL canvas may be blank in headless Chrome (documented known limitation), so visual fade effect cannot be confirmed via screenshot alone.
frictions.resolution: Used source code verification of FADE_AREA, FADE_RINGS, createBoundaryFadeGeoJSON(), createBoundaryFadeLayers(), and map-view.tsx integration as primary evidence per AGENTS.md guidance

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-MAP-007 (boundary fade) verified via source code showing 7 graduated fade rings with opacity 0→0.95 around FADE_AREA bounds, integrated as GeoJSON source+layers in map-view.tsx. VAL-MAP-008 (pan bounds) verified via React props confirming maxBounds=[[-73.95,40.675],[-73.885,40.72]] active at runtime, preventing navigation to Manhattan. VAL-CROSS-010 (seed data) verified by reading data/places.ts: 21 places across 6 categories with valid Bushwick coordinates.
